content_summary: This file is the main entry point of the FingerprintJS library, providing an interface to all library functions. It acts as a coordinator, orchestrating the interaction between different components such as IdentifierHarvesting, DeviceInfoTreeProvider, and FingerprintTreeCalculator. It provides methods to retrieve a stable device identifier, compute a device fingerprint, and get fingerprint information in its raw form.
fingerprint_contribution: This file contributes to the final device fingerprint by coordinating the collection of device information, computing the fingerprint using a specified hash function, and returning the fingerprint as a string. The fingerprint is computed based on a combination of hardware information and device identifiers.
